name: court_calendar
description: a court calendar and judge-assignment world; actions assign, reschedule, hear

card.description: a court calendar and judge-assignment world; actions assign, reschedule, hear

rules: A case advances strictly: filed -> assigned -> scheduled -> heard.

'assign' gives a filed case to a named judge who still has spare capacity (load < capacity), raising that judge's load by one; with no params it picks the next filed case and the least-loaded available judge.
A judge cannot be assigned a case beyond their capacity.
'reschedule' places an assigned (or already scheduled) case onto a calendar day, marking it scheduled; with no day it moves to the next day.
'hear' disposes a scheduled case: it becomes heard, the count of heard cases rises by one, the assigned judge's load drops by one, and the court day advances to the hearing day.
Any action whose target is missing, ineligible, or out of capacity leaves the state unchanged.
